# Extração: 15.02-BioHarmony FB Edits_Kutasi_New AOV Close

How an Unexpected High School Reunion Led One Woman to

Discover the “BioHarmony Switch”

And finally win the battle against her waistline







This exciting and simple solution is being used by hundreds of women across the country to burn fat, reclaim their body, and make their friends green with envy.

 

Hey, my name is Scarlett Peralta.Over the next few minutes, I’m going to tell you a frustrating true story about my 15th high school reunion…It was the moment I came face-to-face with the fact I was 47 lbs. overweight…

And everyone could see it.Truthfully, it was hard to miss…

It had become a struggle to conceal my belly no matter how “creative” I got with my outfits…Sometimes it felt like my neck was starting to disappear… And the way fat jumped off my arms, I’d often joke to friends that it looked like it was trying to escape…





But after that night, I couldn't keep lying to myself…Clothes I bought just the year before now pinched deep into my hips as they strained to hold everything in…And every time I logged-in to Facebook, I’d see old pictures that reminded me of how hot I used to be.I’d reached my breaking point.Right then, I decided to lose my extra fat and restore the slender and sexy body I once had.And girl, I’ll tell you…It was the best decision of my life, because it sparked…



A desperate struggle to lose weight that led to the discovery of an incredible, unusual weight-loss secret…

...that help cut pounds of nagging fat with very little effort!



See, three months ago I stepped into my High School reunion.It didn’t take long before I got to talking with old friends…And then I saw Sophie Baker, my old best friend.I was so excited to see her again…We used to do everything together…In fact, we even used to look like each other!

And oh my, she looked great when she stepped into the hall that night.Sophie had barely changed since high school.She was still so beautiful… so slim… like I always remembered.It didn’t take long for someone to call her over…She said hello to everyone with a hug, then she looked at me…I was grinning from ear to ear…I couldn’t believe I was finally being reunited with my best friend…



But what Sophie did next floored me.

It frustrated me.

Yet, it ultimately led to an incredible weight-loss secret that can help melt away unwanted fat -- without becoming a slave to exercising, dieting or counting calories!



As soon as she looked at me, I knew something was wrong…The smile fell off her face… and she didn’t try to hug me.Instead she frowned, like she was thinking.That’s when I realized… she didn’t recognize me.“I’m sorry, it’s been so long. I don’t remember your name.” she said.My stomach dropped...I froze…Everyone was looking at me....



How could she forget her old best friend? Then it hit me…

I was carrying an extra 47 lbs. since High School.

She didn’t have a clue who I was.And even though no one said it, I knew what everyone must have been thinking…

“She’s let herself go.”

I ran out of the hall and locked myself in the nearest bathroom stall.Tears were already streaming down my face…I looked down and saw my stomach popping through my dress…Heck, I could’ve grabbed a handful of it if I wanted!I couldn’t ignore it anymore.I wasn’t the same slender, attractive girl that left high school…

In fact, I wasn’t just overweight… I had an extra 47 lbs. that I wished I didn’t. 

 

In that moment I remembered how I’d always avoid looking at myself naked in the mirror after a shower…… and always wear baggy t-shirts and big jeans to cover up my body.

For the past few years, I never even looked closely enough to see my skin around my belly button…How my chin covered up my neck like a thick scarf in winter…And I’d always ignored the folds hanging off my arms -- even when they sent ripples through the rest of my body when I moved.

Of course, I knew I’d gained a couple pounds per year since High School…



I mean, haven’t we all?It’s hard to stay in shape with two kids and a part-time job…… I just didn’t realize how much it added up.You know how it is…Back in our 20s we could just skip dessert and lose 7 lbs. in a week… 

Now it feels like you’re hopeless against the nagging fat that keeps piling on to your body. And when you get to your thirties, it feels like you put on weight even faster! Sure, I’d tried every fad diet and trendy exercise…



Slim Fast, Atkins, Juicing, Keto, Weight Watchers, Zumba, Kickboxing, Pilates…I’d lose some weight…But as soon as I stopped the intense hours of exercising and calorie counting, the weight would just pile on again.So, for the last few years I just ignored my bulging belly, sagging arm fat and legs…Not to mention the other parts of being overweight you don’t expect…





The intense food cravings and rabid appetite that haunt you around the clock… 



Heavy, tired eyes by lunchtime because you spent the night tossing and turning…



Feeling unenergized, like you’re being weighed down by a truck everyday…



The aches and pains in your ankles, knees and back as your bones scream out from years of being crushed by too much bodyweight, and… 



Constant brain fog that lingers over every part of your day… 



I buried it ALL in the back of my mind.



But when Sophie saw me and didn’t even recognize me… it all hit me at once. 



I was miserable.



“Me and Sophie looked like twins in high school, 

why is she still so perfect?” 



She didn’t have a bulging stomach…



She didn’t wear baggy clothes to hide everything… 



And she never had the shame of knowing that everyone you see, thinks you’ve “let yourself go”... 



Sophie was still the slender girl that left high school 15 years ago. 



Sure, you could tell she was now in her mid-thirties, but with her slim body she was beautiful. She looked so young! 



It wasn’t just Sophie who looked great that night either…



One of our other friends, Elizabeth, had always been a little chubby back in high school. I remember some of the boys even picking on her. And yet she looked incredible now, even after 3 kids!  



While another friend, Jenny, must have lost 30 lbs. herself. She looked amazing! 



I couldn’t believe it…



I was once the slim and attractive girl that men used to fall over themselves to help out and flirt with… 



Now I just felt invisible.



As soon as I got home that same evening

 I collapsed into my husband's arms, crying… 



My voice quivered…



My body was shaking…



And my sleeve was soaking wet from all the tears it had mopped up… 



I explained what happened, desperate for him to tell me I was still the hot girl he first fell in love with… 



He replied, “I love you because of who you are on the inside”... 



It hurt but it wasn’t his fault… 



He just told me the truth. 



I was sad and ashamed. But in that moment, I decided to do something about it… 



I was going to find a way to fight back against 

my excess hanging fat and finally lose weight for good…



So next time, my old friends would be jealous of me! 



I knew it was possible…



Because we’ve all got a friend like Sophie who looks amazing even with two kids and a busy job.



If it’s possible for her, it’s possible for us.



So, I threw myself at losing weight…



I signed up for a gym membership and worked my butt off.



I counted calories…



Only drunk water…



And just a week later I’d lost 5 lbs. 



I was so motivated and happy, but it didn’t last long…



Because that’s when my weight-loss journey came to a screeching halt.



Even if I worked out more… and cut more calories… 



The scale wouldn’t budge.



I was literally working out every single morning for 2 hours…



Jogging on treadmills, using the elliptical and lifting weights.



It was HARD and it wasn’t working.



And the second I took a day off, those 5 lbs. started to creep back on again.



I felt like giving up. 



But I couldn’t…



Not when Sophie -- the girl I looked so similar to in high school -- looked so amazing. 



And I’m glad I didn’t stop searching...



Because I made an incredible discovery that HUNDREDS of ladies (and men) from all walks of life are now using to melt off the nagging fat, tighten up their bodies and look better than ever. 



I spent weeks searching the web…



I bought every weight loss magazine I could….



I even tried fat burning supplements like green coffee bean extract and garcinia cambogia… 



But still, nothing worked.



Then I had an idea… 



I had one final chance to discover the secret… 

I had to talk to Sophie. 



Moments later I’d found her phone number online. 



I was nervous.



But I had to discover her secret…



I punched in her number and hit dial…



“Hey, it’s Scarlett Peralta.” 



Sophie tried to apologize immediately. But I jumped in… 



“We used to look so similar. Remember how people used to think we were twins? You look exactly the same! But I’m… well, I’m fat… How do you look so amazing?” 



The phone went silent.



A few moments later she spoke again.



She told me to promise not to tell anyone. And that only her and a few of our old school friends knew about it…   



Sophie told me the weight-loss secret wasn’t plastic surgery or dangerous barely legal drugs… 



She even told me she once struggled with her own nagging fat as well…



She’d tried everything I had. Dieting, over-exercising, counting calories… 



Yet Sophie’s fat began to melt away when she discovered 

the “BioHarmony Switch”. 



It was the work of Dr. Zane Sterling.



Sophie called him “the second most important man she’s ever met” after her husband. 



She told me that Dr. Sterling has spent the last 20 years establishing more than 100 of the largest natural health clinics across America. 



Of course, I was skeptical at first…



But Sophie told me that Dr. Sterling is not like the other so-called “experts”. 



She said that while other weight-loss doctors focus only on making your thyroid speed up your metabolism, that’s just half the story…



And Dr. Sterling knows the other half. 



That was all I needed.



I booked a call with Dr. Sterling for the very next day…



And I was shaking with excitement when the time for our call finally came. 



After talking to a receptionist and waiting on hold for a few minutes…



Finally, Dr. Sterling answered the phone…



And he greeted me and asked how he could help.



“Sophie Baker told me about the BioHarmony Switch… I need to know what it is.” 



He paused…



I squirmed in my seat. 



I was afraid maybe Dr. Sterling wasn’t going to be willing to help me…



But after a long pause…



Suddenly he began talking very excitedly…



And he told me that while the human body is incredibly complex…



Really there were just two organs that I needed to know about. 



The first is the one you’re probably familiar with; the thyroid.



He explained that the thyroid controls your metabolism and when it slows down it becomes really hard to burn fat.



But that’s only half the story.



He told me that the adrenal glands are just as important. 



They’re like walnut-sized triangles and they sit atop both of your kidneys. 



He explained that they're responsible for releasing a group of hormones called “glucocorticoids”.



And his incredible discovery began when Stanford’s School of Medicine studied why these hormones were leading to an enormous amount of weight gain in some folks. 



<Stanford medicine logo> 



What he read blew him away... 



See, the Stanford researchers found that the glucocorticoids “controls the switch that produce fat cells”. 



Simply said, the more glucocorticoids circulating around your body, the more weight you gain… 



Which means your waist adds yet another inch …



Your arms and legs grow larger and larger…



And your stomach balloons further away from you.



Yet it also means that with less glucocorticoids in your system, the opposite happens! 



I almost fell off my chair when he told me. Can you imagine how easy weight-loss would be if you could literally flick a switch and outright STOP the production of your fat cells? 



You wouldn’t need to cut out carbs… watch every calorie… or do whatever the latest fad diet is selling. 



You wouldn’t need to almost kill yourself every morning on the treadmill.



You could just flick the “switch” and watch the fat melt off your body.



Except, this Stanford research came out in 2018. Two years ago!

And women and men across America are still struggling with the shame of trying to lose weight while seeing no change on the scale. 



That’s why Dr. Sterling is so important.



He told me he had to go one step further to really unlock the fat-burning potential the Stanford research hinted at. 



And that’s exactly how he discovered the “BioHarmony Switch” that so many folks are already raving about.



See, the doctor decided to take a closer look at the glucocorticoids in the study so he could understand why this research wasn’t being repeated in “the real world”. 



His conclusion? 



Trying to dial down every glucocorticoid was simply too broad of an approach to ever be effective… 



So he decided to hone-in on just one; Cortisol.



You may know it better as the “stress hormone”. 



The doctor studied it in one of his state-of-the-art clinics to uncover how it could be used to help you lose weight fast. 



He said he worked long days, only ever leaving to go home and sleep. But it was all worth it… 



Because the doctor was staggered by the results… 



He found that stress-induced cortisol has a direct effect on your thyroid.



More specifically, he found that cortisol blocks your thyroid from boosting your metabolism. And that’s exactly why you’re not losing weight like you want to.



Now I know you may be thinking… “I’m not that stressed am I?” 



Well the truth is, you’re sitting on a lifetime of stress.



Think about it…



Most women I know were much thinner when they were younger… just like I was. 



We may not have been super-slender, but we looked good...



And the biggest stress back then was deciding which skirt to wear… 



But then we got older.



If you’re like me, you probably started to experience “family stress” like stopping your kids from fighting, trying to get your 3-year-old to go to bed on time, countless doctor appointments… 



As well as “work stress” -- mounting deadlines, demanding bosses, daily commutes… 



Oh and let’s not forget the biggest stress of all, childbirth! 



In other words, you’ve experienced a lot of stress every single day. 



And no matter how big or small that stress is, it causes your body to pump more cortisol into your body… 



Keeping your weight-loss switch  “OFF”... 



Slowing down your thyroid… and your metabolism.



That’s why it becomes so hard to lose weight as we get older. All this stress is still having an effect! 



Sure, the scale will move if you watch what you’re eating and force yourself through intense workouts every morning…  



But you know what? Even intense exercise is flooding your body with cortisol, according to a study published in the Journal of Endocrinological Investigation. 



That explains why you’ll drop 5 lbs. but put it straight back on as soon as you stop exercising!



And that’s not all…



Another study from the University of California proved that the amount of cortisol in your body rises as you age. So the older you get, the more “stress hormone” you have working to bring your metabolism to a standstill. 



In other words, it’s like everything is trying to stop you from losing weight. 



But there’s hope…



You simply flip the “BioHarmony Switch” 

and watch as the fat melts off your body! 



I sat there stunned. 



The doctor had just told me the other half of the story…



It wasn’t just about your thyroid.  



Cortisol was the real and undeniable reason why my metabolism was so low… and why I couldn’t lose weight no matter what I tried.



So I asked…



“How do I flip the BioHarmony Switch, doctor?” 



I was expecting him to say I needed antidepressants to fight back against the daily stress of life. Or maybe some other synthetic medication to remedy all the cortisol I’ve produced over a lifetime… 



But Dr. Sterling told me it was much easier than I thought… 



See, he’d spent months researching precisely how to flip the switch.



In fact, he says he’s the only person to have ever done this research… 



He looked through medical study after medical study…



From the most cutting-edge research institutions like Harvard, Stanford, John Hopkins and Yale…



When he found something promising, he’d work with patients at his clinics. 



Yet nothing worked.



Each time he’d go back to the books.



Until he eventually uncovered a strange group of organic, natural plants described in ancient medical textbooks... and recently rediscovered by researchers.



One of these plants caught his eyes for its proven, stress-relieving properties… 



So he started sharing it with his patients…



And almost immediately they were calling him, amazed at the results…



Though the doctor told me there’s one catch: 



To enjoy weight-loss results like you’ve seen, you can’t just chop the plant up and mix it in with your evening stew… 



You’ve got to extract a liquid from it first if you want to melt the fat off your body! 



Just moments after explaining this, the doctor asked if I could facetime with him. 



I was surprised to say the least, but he said there was something he wanted to show me…



So I told him that was fine, and he said he was going to call me back in a moment form his cell phone.



A few moments later, he did call back…



And after saying “hello” again, the doctor then pointed his phone’s camera towards his desk…



And pulled out a small bottle from the top drawer. 



He explained that inside the bottle was the liquid form of the plant he’d been telling me about…



The one that can help regulate cortisol… 



And he said that: 



It doesn’t matter how old you are.



It doesn’t matter how stressed you are in your day-to-day life.



It doesn’t even matter how much unwanted fat you want to lose. 



You simply take a few drops of this liquid per day to flick your “BioHarmony Switch” and you’ll see your nagging fat begin to disappear! 



And then Dr. Sterling told me that he would go ahead and send me a bottle of this liquid…



That way I could try it out for myself…



And I gave him my address. 



I was so desperate to lose those 47 lbs. I’d tried everything. Now finally it sounded as though I was going to be holding the real key to weight loss in my hands…



And that night it was almost impossible for me to fall asleep…



Because I simply couldn’t wait for Dr. Sterling’s liquid to arrive. 



Fortunately, the doctor was kind enough to send me his liquid via express mail…



So I got it the very next day… 



And the second it arrived…



I opened the bottle at my dining room table and squeezed the tube to suck up a droplet. 



Just from the scent you could tell there were no filler or cheap ingredients. 



I lifted up my tongue and squeezed a droplet out… 



And you know what? I didn’t expect them to work so fast! 



That very next morning I felt just so relaxed. Even though one of my kids was sick. In fact, I felt so calm I thought it was just a placebo-effect… 



Yet that same relaxed feeling carried on, day after day, and I stopped doubting it completely. I began to really look forward to seeing the scale move next…



And it did! 



At first, I only dropped a single lb.…



Then another…



And another…



Until by the end of the first week, I’d lost 5 lbs.! 



I hadn’t changed my normal routine. I wasn’t in the gym every morning. And sure, I was eating healthy, but I wasn’t skimping on the foods I love. 



I was losing weight because I’d flicked my BioHarmony Switch! 



Of course, I was still worried that I’d just put those lbs. right back on…



Yet by the end of the second week I’d lost another 5 lbs.! 



And it didn’t stop there…



Just a month after I took control of my BioHarmony Switch, I was down 20 lbs.



Girl, I wouldn’t have believed it if I couldn’t see the changes happening with my own eyes. My bulging belly was disappearing, my jeans were no longer straining to hold everything in and my face looked tighter and more youthful than it had in at least a decade.



Yet by the end of the 3rd month is when my life really changed… 



I was shopping with my husband when 

I was mistaken for my old best friend Sophie Baker! 



By this point I’d lost all 47 lbs. I’d been carrying around like a bag of rocks. In fact, I think I’d lost even more. I hadn’t looked this good since I was in my early 20s! 



My stomach was flat (I could see some abs!), my arms were tight like I remember them, and I could even fit into jeans I hadn’t touched since I gave birth to my first child.



I looked hot. 



I was crossing the street when a woman grabbed me…



“I didn’t think I’d bump into you here Sophie!”



At first I was confused…



Then I realized what was happening and wanted to jump up and down. 



Just a matter of months ago I could only dream of looking like Sophie again. She just looked so slender and perfect. And now I was being mistaken for her. 



The woman’s name was Michelle. She’d been at my High School Reunion and had seen what happened…



I said I was Scarlett. 



Her eyes told the whole story. She could barely believe what she saw. After a moment she said “WOW! You look amazing. You look like a supermodel!” 



I was so happy… and speechless.



Then my husband jumped in…



“Yeah, my wife is super hot.”



I couldn’t even remember the last time I’d heard those words from him.  



Yet it’s not just friends and family telling me I look great…



Now young men are turning their heads to check me out…



And even other women in the Starbucks queue ask for my “secret”. 



I'm a totally new woman… and I love it! 



And here’s what I love just as much…



I’m not a special case or one-off. 



Women all over the country are seeing the same 

wonderful weight-loss I have! 



Oh, and if you’re wondering…



These droplets flick your “BioHarmony Switch” with ZERO negative side effects…



Plus, anyone can afford it… 



And best of all, it works for everyone! 



There’s one good reason why…



The “BioHarmony Switch” breakthrough is backed by

rigorous scientific evidence. 



See, Dr. Sterling has spent months researching his secret to understand exactly why it’s so powerful… 



And he’s given me permission to share the official studies with you today.



Take one randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trial…



(By the way, that’s the gold-standard of medical testing.)



It involved up to 60 females who were dealing with chronic stress. 



Their cortisol levels were off the charts at the beginning of the study.



They were each given the “BioHarmony” plant; Rhodiola.



When the results came back, even the doctor couldn’t believe it…



This one study PROVED that the BioHarmony secret dramatically “decreased the cortisol response to stress!” 



Remember, cortisol is keeping your “BioHarmony Switch” turned off, stopping you from losing weight… 



Yet with just this one amazing nutrient, you can virtually eliminate the cortisol…



Turning the BioHarmony Switch back on…



And start dropping as 12..17..even 23 lbs of nagging fat right away. 



Imagine! In just a matter of weeks, this one nutrient could let you cut the unwanted weight and make the clothes you’re wearing right now hang off your body... 



Even better, this study also showed that Rhodiola has another secret benefit…



It increases your mental performance too. So not only will you lose weight, you’ll feel smarter! 



In just a moment I’ll show you how to join hundreds of women who are loving the BioHarmony secret… 



First, I want to show you another amazing study published in the Nutrition Research Journal…



Why? Because it’s AMAZING! 



They found that just a few drops of Rhodiola led to a 30% decrease in fat…



…within just 10 days! 



That’s how powerful this breakthrough is… 



Though I know what you’re thinking… it “sounds too good to be true”. 



But it really does work…



You can see the difference with your own eyes... 



Thousands of ladies just like you have dropped their nagging fat… 



Without dieting… exercise… or surgery.



These ladies are living their best life. And I guarantee they’re making their friends and family green with envy! 



And YOU can too -- because ANYONE can turn their “BioHarmony Switch” on… 



Now, here’s the crazy thing…



The women who came to the doctor’s clinic would discover how to turn their BioHarmony Switch on… 



And they were having amazing weight-loss results…



Yet they were the only people who knew about it. 



The doctor didn’t advertise and he never mentioned the formula in his media interviews…  



So millions of women were missing out on his incredible fat-loss secret! 



But I’d seen how effective it is -- I’d lost over 47 lbs.! 



And I knew I had to get his formula into as many ladies’ hands’ as possible.



So I sat down at my computer and wrote this exact email…



Dr. Sterling,



Today I looked in the mirror and could barely recognize myself. Instead of seeing an overweight, unhappy person… I saw a beautiful, slender woman.



I felt so happy I almost cried! 



I want everyone to feel this way, because we should all love ourselves.



How can we make this available to every woman in America? 



He called me just twenty minutes later. 



I could hear the excitement in his voice… 



He told me he’d never thought of offering his formula outside of his clinics. But he wanted to! 



Which is why, now you can get your hands on the “BioHarmony Switch” breakthrough -- at a price, ANYONE can afford. 



So, if you’ll let me, I’d like to tell you all about it:



Introducing the ONLY “BioHarmony Switch” Formula…

BioHarmony Complex Plus by Science Naturals

- 6 Bottle Graphic-



Let me tell you, directly from my heart, if you want to start dropping pounds of fat effortlessly… 



… to shrink your belly and reveal the sexy definition you haven’t seen in years… 



… to remove nagging fat from around your neck, chin and cheeks (making you look and feel years younger)…

So well in fact that you’ll see a difference in just days from now.



No matter your age, weight, or what you’ve tried before. 



Bottomline, this WILL work for you. 



In fact, the first thing you’ll notice is that you feel calm and care-free, just like when you were young. 



Next, you’ll see the scales move… 



With each extra day that goes by, you’ll look in the mirror and literally how fat appears to be vanishing from your stomach, arms, legs and face. 



And take it from me, there’s nothing better than seeing your unwanted weight melt off your body… 



You’ll notice a bounce in your step. You’ll be happier. The aches and pains you’ve struggled with will feel better, or maybe disappear altogether. 



But my favorite part and Dr. Sterling’s biggest promise? 



In as little as 7 days of use, your friends, family and colleagues will start to notice the change.



They won’t be able to hold back the compliments.



And they’ll definitely ask for your secret… 



When you tell them, they won’t believe that it’s so easy!



And it really is -- you simply take one droplet of BioHarmony Complex Plus in the morning and let it work. 



It won’t take long before you join all the American women now raving about BioHarmony Complex Plus because of their incredible results… 



Yet, I’ve got a special surprise for you that makes BioHarmony Complex Plus even BETTER at helping you cut weight from your hips, belly and every other part of your body! 



The BioHarmony Switch is just the foundation…



This weight-loss formula is packed with TEN more 

incredible fat-erasing nutrients! 



Dr. Sterling knew that turning your BioHarmony Switch “on” with Rhodiola was incredibly effective at helping you drop your unloved and ugly fat… 



Yet he wanted to make it even more powerful before it was made available to every person in America…



So he and the team at Science Naturals began experimenting with other nutrients.



Some you may have heard of, most you haven’t… 



And Dr. Sterling said the results were nothing short of mind-blowing…



Women who had already lost 20 lbs. started to lose even more weight, even quicker.



And women who had only just discovered the BioHarmony Switch secret saw the fat melt away faster than anything Dr. Sterling had seen before. 



After months of testing -- and with the verifiable proof in the doctor’s hands -- he was finally able to select ten BONUS nutrients that work alongside Rhodiola to help you restore the slender body you once had. 



Today you’ll find them ALL in BioHarmony Complex Plus. 



And look -- I know you want to get it in your hands as soon as possible, but I’m so excited I just have to tell you how great they are. So if you’ll let me, I’d like to show you them right now…



The first incredible bonus nutrient is one of my favorites… 



It melts the fat right off your body! 



It’s called “L-Ornithine”.



The doctor told me it caught his eye when he read an impressive study in the Journal of Nutrition. 



The researchers took a group of 52 stressed-out individuals…



In other words, people who had a lot of cortisol flowing through their body at the time…



Half were given a placebo and the other half received L-Ornithine. 



The results were staggering… 



Thanks to L-Ornithine “cortisol levels were significantly decreased”.



Amazing, isn’t it? And here’s what it means for you… 



It will help flick your “BioHarmony Switch” and make it so much easier and faster to cut the unwanted weight. So you can finally roll back the years and dig out your old clothes! 



Even more impressive is that study after study has come to the same conclusion. 



Like one from The National Institute of Health, who found that L-Ornithine “accelerates body fat loss”. And that’s not all… 



If you love a morning coffee like I do, then you’ll find that L-Ornithine works with your caffeine fix to bump your mood up. So you’ll be dancing all day long and without the jitters!  



Now just these two ingredients -- Rhodiola and L-Ornithine -- could transform your body and make you as slender (and sexy) as you were 25-years ago… 



Yet they’re not the only impressive ingredients inside this formula… 



This second bonus “BioHarmony” nutrient 

is proven to help burn up to 520% more fat! 



It’s called “L-Carnitine”.



Of course, it’s also amazing at decreasing your stress-induced cortisol levels.



But there’s one thing about this wonderful nutrient that really jumps out to me…

What’s the “BioHarmony Switch” breakthrough again?



It’s the breakthrough created by Dr. Sterling that turned a groundbreaking Stanford discovery into a highly effective fat-loss solution.



In short, Stanford proved that a group of hormones called Glucocorticoids controlled the switch that produces fat cells. 



Dr. Sterling used cutting-edge science to discover how you could flick the BioHarmony Switch using natural, organic nutrients. That way folks can shed their nagging body fat rapidly. 



How long will it take to get results?



Everyone’s body is different so results will vary. But I can tell you that for a lot of folks, they notice that their clothes are feeling looser after their first week. They also say their belly has started looking smaller, and that they feel lighter than before.
